# Lucky Cat HSK — Art Assets

**Status:** all PNGs in this folder are generated by `../make_assets.py` (programmatic
festive vector-style art via Pillow + numpy). Re-run `python make_assets.py` from the
`game/` folder to regenerate them. The 4 nav icon buttons are already wired to their
PNGs in `index.html`; `#home-sound` stays emoji so its 🔔/🔕 on/off state shows.

**Fonts:** `fonts/title.woff2` is **ZCOOL KuaiLe** (SIL OFL, license in `fonts/OFL.txt`),
subset to ASCII + 招财猫 (~6 KB) with `pyftsubset --unicodes="U+0020-007E,U+62DB,U+8D22,U+732B"`.
Only the `h1` title and `.bignum` score digits use it; anything outside the subset falls
back to Segoe UI per the `@font-face` stack. Re-subset from the full TTF if the title
text ever gains new hanzi.

To swap any PNG for higher-fidelity AI/painted art later, just overwrite the file with
the same name and dimensions — no code changes needed. All assets have code/CSS
fallbacks (gradients + vector cat + emoji), so the game runs fully even with the folder
emptied.

## Shared generation brief

> "flat 2D mobile-game cartoon, thick dark outlines, soft cel shading,
> Chinese New Year festive palette: crimson #c1272d, gold #f5c518, ink #1a0d0d,
> warm lantern light."

## Asset manifest

| File | Size (px) | Transparent | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| `bg-home.png` | 1080×1920 | no | Home hero: night sky, moon+stars, hanging red lanterns, gold clouds, pagoda silhouettes. CSS `background-image` on `#s-home`. |
| `bg-battle.png` | 1024×512 | no | Battle scenery, landscape; ground plane in bottom ~15% aligned with canvas ground line. CSS `background-image` on `#cv`. |
| `cat-walk.png` | 1536×256 — 6 frames of 256×256, horizontal strip | yes | Walking cat (side view, faces left) carrying a small 福 flag. Drawn via `ctx.drawImage(img, f*256, 0, 256, 256, …)`. |
| `cat-happy.png` | 1024×256 — 4 frames of 256×256, horizontal strip | yes | Cat celebrating (hop + sparkle) for the ~250 ms correct-answer window. |
| `maneki.png` | 512×512 | yes | Sitting 招财猫 mascot, paw raised — left-side character replacing 🐱. |
| `coin.png` | 128×128 | yes | Gold coin (方孔钱). Used as canvas projectile, particle burst, and HUD score-pill icon. |
| `lantern.png` | 256×384 | yes | Red lantern; decorative corners (Home/Results) with CSS sway animation. |
| `cloud.png` | 512×256 | yes | Gold 祥云 cloud; decorative behind titles / results screens. |
| `btn-learn.png` | 160×160 | yes | Gold circular icon button — Flashcards. Home icon row. Fallback = CSS gold radial disc + 🃏 emoji. |
| `btn-scores.png` | 160×160 | yes | Gold circular icon button — High Scores. Fallback = 🏆 emoji. |
| `btn-progress.png` | 160×160 | yes | Gold circular icon button — Progress. Fallback = 📈 emoji. |
| `btn-howto.png` | 160×160 | yes | Gold circular icon button — How to Play. Fallback = ❓ emoji. |
| `btn-sound.png` | 160×160 | yes | Gold circular icon button — Sound toggle. Fallback = 🔔/🔕 emoji. |
| `fonts/title.woff2` | — | — | Display font for arcade title + big numbers. ZCOOL KuaiLe (OFL), subset to ASCII + 招财猫. `@font-face` falls back to Segoe UI. |

## After dropping in assets

1. All PNG/WOFF2 files load automatically — no code changes needed.
2. Once icon-button PNGs exist, enable `.has-art` on `#s-home` for pixel-perfect art
   (hide the emoji fallback via `font-size:0` on `.icon-btn.has-art`).
3. Run `make_icons.py` to regenerate `pwa/icons/icon-192.png` and `icon-512.png` from
   a new maneki-on-crimson source image.
4. Run `node scripts/stage-www.js` (+ `npm run cap:sync` for Android) to publish.

## Compression targets

- `bg-home.png` / `bg-battle.png`: may ship as `.jpg` (one-line CSS `url()` change) — target ≲500 KB each.
- Sprite sheets: `pngquant --quality=70-90`; total assets folder ≲1.5 MB.
